may_do: Build an internal prototype that drafts replies into a human review queue.
Run the prototype on the next twenty real tickets with a human reviewing every draft.
must_not_do: Send any AI-written reply to a customer without human approval.
Announce, demo externally, or sell the feature.
must_ask: Who reviews every draft during the trial, by name?

rationale: A strategic partner demo in three weeks needs a working draft queue. The founder accepts the evidence gap for an internal-only prototype behind a mandatory human review step, and accepts personally owning the outcome if the tripwires fire.
tripwires: Any AI-drafted reply reaches a customer without human approval.
The partner demo is cancelled or moved beyond the override window.
renewal_requires: Twenty human-reviewed tickets with approval rate and edit distance filed as evidence receipts.
